About

I am Thomas Sing-wing Wu, a high school student from Shanghai, China. I am a computer scientist, Sinologist, researcher, swimming athlete, and a bathroom singer.

I founded LinkScape in 2022, a student-led open-source organization aimed at empowering young developers to build real-world software, and completed a three-month paid virtual internship with Hack Club in 2023—both when I was thirteen.

In 2024, I competed in the Hong Kong Swimming Olympic Trials.

My academic interests focus primarily on natural language processing and computational linguistics, especially when combined with philosophy and Sinology.

I am also a member of the Linguistic Society of Hong Kong.

I am native in English and several Chinese dialects, including Mandarin, Shanghainese, Cantonese, and Old National Pronunciation, and am also new to Spanish.
